subcodes.first_line: O my God, the One and Incomparable! The heedless reckon the familiar as strangers, and account the friend as foe. They imagine the morn of guidance to be the night of darkness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خدای يگانه غافلان آشنا را بيگانه شمرند و يار را اغيار پندارند صبح هدايت را شام ظلمت تصور کنند
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for opponents; enemies of the Faith, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
